prePrompt.title: Get instant duty alerts
prePrompt.body: Turn on notifications to know the moment a ride matches your cities.

dutyAlerts.title: Get Duty Alerts
dutyAlerts.addUpTo: Add up to {max} cities to get matching duty alerts
dutyAlerts.blockedHint: Notifications are blocked. Turn them on for EaseCab in your browser or phone settings, then tap the toggle again.
